topics.summary: The primary insurrection (내란우두머리) verdict against former President Yoon Suk-yeol is scheduled for May 28, 2026, just days before the June 3 local elections. An earlier appeal on the arrest-obstruction charge already yielded a 7-year sentence in late April, and special prosecutors have filed additional charges, keeping the trial at the center of political coverage.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 – 5월 28일 오전 10시 선고 예고
2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지 – 징역 7년 선고
[내란 1심 선고] '반성없는 윤석열 감형사유 없어‥내란죄 사형해야'

topics.summary: The 9th nationwide local elections are scheduled for June 3, 2026, with candidate registration now complete. DPK leads in most metropolitan races, while PPP defends incumbent positions in several regions; turnout dynamics and strategic voting are dominant storylines with two weeks remaining.

evidence_headlines.title: [6.3 지방선거] 단체장 공천…여당은 '현역 탈락', 국힘은 '구인난'
다양한 지방선거 기사를 만나보세요 – 후보 등록 완료·판세 분석
지방선거 대진표 속속 윤곽...'공천 잡음'도 계속

topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Blocked by PPP Boycott
topics.summary: A cross-party constitutional amendment—backed by six parties and aimed at enshrining the spirit of the May 18 Gwangju Uprising and tightening martial-law requirements—failed to reach the required two-thirds quorum on May 7–8 after PPP legislators boycotted the vote. The PPP's refusal to participate has drawn sharp public criticism ahead of the local elections.

evidence_headlines.title: '5·18 정신 수록' 39년 만의 개헌‥국힘 불참으로 끝내 '불성립'
개헌안 국회 본회의 상정됐지만 국민의힘 불참…표결 불성립
[정치] 39년 만의 개헌 시도 무산...지방선거 D-25, 판세는?

topics.topic_en: DPK Nomination Scandal Erodes Honam Support
topics.topic_ko: 민주당 공천 내홍으로 호남 지지율 급락
topics.summary: DPK's support in its Honam (Jeolla) heartland dropped 14.3 percentage points in a single week to 57.2%, driven by nomination controversies including the expulsion and independent candidacy of North Jeolla Governor Kim Gwan-young over a cash-distribution scandal, along with illegal primary operations in multiple districts.

evidence_headlines.title: '공천 후폭풍에 민심 흔들리나'…민주당 호남 지지율 '급락' [6·3의 선택]
민주당 지지율 호남서 14.3%p 급락…공천 잡음에 텃밭 흔들렸나
더불어민주당 제9회 전국동시지방선거 공천 갈등

topics.topic_en: Korea-US Trade and Defense Deal Confirmed
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung held a phone call with President Trump on May 17 to reaffirm the landmark Korea-US trade and security deal, which includes a $150 billion Korean shipbuilding investment in the US, tariff relief, and US approval for South Korea to build nuclear-powered submarines. Implementation details and a nuclear submarine roadmap are imminent.

evidence_headlines.title: 한미 정상 통화, 관세 합의 이행 재확인…'동맹 새롭게 업그레이드한 것'
이재명 '한미 안보·관세 협상 타결 팩트시트 최종 합의'
K-핵잠수함 시대 열린다... 정부, 이르면 이달 말 '10년 로드맵' 발표

topics.topic_ko: 조작기소 특검법 추진 및 여야 충돌
topics.summary: The DPK introduced a special counsel bill targeting alleged prosecutorial misconduct under the Yoon government, covering 12 cases including the Daejang-dong and Seongnam FC probes that implicated President Lee Jae-myung. PPP is denouncing the bill as a self-pardoning device for Lee, while the DPK aims to pass it through the National Assembly in May.

evidence_headlines.title: 민주당 '조작기소 바로잡을 특검 필요' vs 국민의힘 '셀프 면죄부'
與, '공소취소권 부여' 조작기소 특검법 발의…野 '셀프면죄'(종합)
국민의힘 5월 14일 최고위 – 조작기소 특검법은 이재명 면죄부

topics.topic_en: National Dividend Proposal Sparks Economic Debate
topics.topic_ko: 국민배당금 발언 파장 및 경제 논쟁
topics.summary: A comment by Presidential Policy Chief Kim Yong-beom proposing a 'national dividend' drawn from AI and semiconductor windfall tax revenues ignited a fierce debate; the Blue House distanced itself by calling it a personal opinion, but PPP accused the government of populist wealth redistribution. The controversy contributed to a dip in DPK's mid-May polling numbers.

evidence_headlines.title: 김용범 '국민배당금' 파장 … AI 호황 업고 돌아온 '기본소득 시즌2'
'국민배당금' 논란 뒤 남은 질문…반도체 초과세수, 어디에 쓸 것인가
[집중진단] '국민배당금' 논란 커지자 李 대통령 직접 진화…'초과이윤 아닌 초과세수 배당'

topics.topic_en: OPCON Transfer and Nuclear Submarine Autonomy Push
topics.summary: The Lee government is pushing to recover wartime operational control (OPCON) by 2028, one year ahead of the US-preferred 2029 timeline, and is expected to release a 10-year nuclear-powered submarine acquisition roadmap by end of May. Defense autonomy is framed as a complement to the Korea-US alliance modernization deal.

evidence_headlines.title: 한미, 이번 주에 핵잠·전작권 전환 집중 논의…'방식·시점이 관건'
'한국 주도 한반도 방위'‥'미국에 협력하길'
K-핵잠수함 시대 열린다... 정부, 이르면 이달 말 '10년 로드맵' 발표

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
